releaseNotes:
TLAH Studio 3.3.2 stability patch.

Fixes:
- Repairs incomplete tool-call histories before provider requests so failed or partially approved multi-tool runs do not terminate with OpenAI 400 tool_call_id errors.
- Makes web_search parsing more robust for DuckDuckGo HTML/lite results and keeps built-in search domains in the network allowlist for upgraded installs.
- Restores Enter-to-send behavior while keeping Shift+Enter for multiline input.
- Improves dark-mode title-bar button contrast on Windows 11 24H2 systems.
- Adds explicit text/url input scopes for chat and setup/settings fields to improve IME candidate behavior.

Validation:
- Passed Release CI with 141 tests and App/Updater x64 builds.
